page_metadata.biotools__summary: EVlncRNAs is a comprehensive, manually curated, high-quality and freely accessible resource of integrated sequence, structure, functional, and phenotypic information of experimentally validated long noncoding RNAs from all species.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: EVlncRNAs is a comprehensive, manually curated, high-quality and freely accessible resource of integrated sequence, structure, functional, and phenotypic information of experimentally validated long noncoding RNAs from all species.
